title: Hytale Ost Pack
description: Hytale OST instead of minecraft music
body:
# Overview

Hytale OST is a resourcepack which allows for the ultimate immersion by replacing minecrafts background music with Hytale's OST.

---

# Notice
**You can find the Official Hytale OST [HERE](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLBNBEpf9ivBFLSIReah7-ldsgghL72PKH)**

---

## Useful 
**You can check out my other Hytale themed Resourcepack: [Hytale Font](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hytale-font)**
